---
title: "Courses"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# Courses

This section collects teaching materials, lecture notes, examples, assignments, and computational exercises. The page is organized as a general course hub so that additional courses can be added in the future.

::: {.course-banner}

## Available course materials

Select a course below to view its lectures, notes, examples, and computational activities.

:::

## Current courses

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Process Modeling and Simulation

A chemical engineering course on building, solving, and interpreting process models using thermodynamics, material and energy balances, numerical methods, and computer-based simulation.

[View lectures](lectures/lectures.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::

## Future course areas

Additional materials may be added in areas such as thermodynamics, numerical methods, process optimization, process control, computational chemical engineering, and hybrid modeling.

## Course material structure

Each course page may include:

- Lecture notes
- Computational examples
- Assignments or exercises
- Supplementary resources
- Code or simulation activities

## Available lecture materials

- [Process Modeling and Simulation: Lecture overview](lectures/lectures.qmd)
- [Lecture 0](lectures/lecture-0/lecture-0.qmd)
- [Lecture 1](lectures/lecture-1/lecture-1.qmd)
- [Lecture 2](lectures/lecture-2/lecture-2.qmd)
